nasb.text: and he *saw the sky opened up, and an object like a great sheet coming down, lowered by four corners to the ground,

esv.text: and saw the heavens opened and something like a great sheet descending, being let down by its four corners upon the earth.

cnv.text: 看見天開了，有一件東西，好像一塊大布，綁著四角，降在地上。

ccb.text: 看见天开了，有一样东西好像一大块布，四角吊着降到地上，

csbs.text: 看见天开了，有一样东西降下，好像一块大布，四角捆住，缒到地上。
